# Etra: Names & Cultures — Dynamic title names
# Generated by generate_titles.py
#
# Resolves country names based on game rule + ruler culture.
# When game rule = Fantasy: uses ruler's culture language.
# When game rule = English: uses base English name.

# A02: Scarlet Order
A02 = {
	type = country
	text = {
		localization_key = A02_ardrainic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:ardrainic_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A02_torrent
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:torrent_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A02_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:moran_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A02_vulgar_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:vulgar_moran_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A02_sordrenic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sordrenic_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A02_armonorican
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:armonorican_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A02_hravevi
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:hravevi_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A02_vulgar_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A02
		fallback = yes
	}
}
A02_ADJ = { parent = A02 suffix = "_ADJ" }

# A11: The Sanguine Daughters
A11 = {
	type = country
	text = {
		localization_key = A11_ardrainic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:ardrainic_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A11_torrent
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:torrent_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A11_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:moran_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A11_vulgar_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:vulgar_moran_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A11_sordrenic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sordrenic_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A11_armonorican
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:armonorican_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A11_hravevi
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:hravevi_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A11_vulgar_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A11
		fallback = yes
	}
}

# A12: The Eternal Watch

	type = country
	text = {
		localization_key = A12_ardrainic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:ardrainic_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A12_torrent
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:torrent_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A12_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:moran_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A12_vulgar_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:vulgar_moran_language }
		}
	}

		localization_key = A12_sordrenic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sordrenic_language }
		}
	}

		localization_key = A12_armonorican
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:armonorican_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A12_hravevi
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:hravevi_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A12_vulgar_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A12
		fallback = yes
	}
}

# A29: The Preservers of the Mother

		}

			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
		}

		}

		}

		}

		}

	type = country

			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:ardrainic_language }
		}

		}

		}

		}

		}

			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:torrent_language }
		}
	}

		localization_key = A288_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy

		}
	}

		}

# A289: Bear of the Highlands

	type = country
	text = {
		localization_key = A289_ardrainic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:ardrainic_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A289_torrent
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:torrent_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A289_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:moran_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A289_vulgar_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:vulgar_moran_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A289_sordrenic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sordrenic_language }
		}
	}

		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy

		}
	}

		localization_key = A289_hravevi

			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:hravevi_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A289_torrent
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
		}
	}

		localization_key = A289
		fallback = yes
	}
}

# A290: Twelfth Temple of the Stone Path
A290 = {
	type = country
	text = {
		localization_key = A290_ardrainic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:ardrainic_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A290_torrent
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:torrent_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A290_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:moran_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A290_vulgar_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:vulgar_moran_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A290_sordrenic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sordrenic_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A290_armonorican
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:armonorican_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A290_hravevi
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:hravevi_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A290_torrent
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A290
		fallback = yes
	}
}

# A291: Hawk of the Heights
A291 = {
	type = country
	text = {
		localization_key = A291_ardrainic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:ardrainic_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A291_torrent
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:torrent_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A291_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:moran_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A291_vulgar_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:vulgar_moran_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A291_sordrenic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sordrenic_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A291_armonorican
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:armonorican_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A291_hravevi
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:hravevi_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A291_torrent
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A291
		fallback = yes
	}
}

# A302: Exalted Tornados
A302 = {
	type = country
	text = {
		localization_key = A302_ardrainic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:ardrainic_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A302_torrent
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:torrent_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A302_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:moran_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A302_vulgar_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:vulgar_moran_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A302_sordrenic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sordrenic_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A302_armonorican
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:armonorican_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A302_hravevi
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:hravevi_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A302_torrent
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A302
		fallback = yes
	}
}

# A169: Little Serpent
A169 = {
	type = country
	text = {
		localization_key = A169_ardrainic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:ardrainic_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A169_torrent
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:torrent_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A169_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:moran_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A169_vulgar_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:vulgar_moran_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A169_sordrenic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sordrenic_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A169_armonorican
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:armonorican_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A169_hravevi
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:hravevi_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A169_torrent
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A169
		fallback = yes
	}
}

# A176: Bluehorn
A176 = {
	type = country
	text = {
		localization_key = A176_ardrainic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:ardrainic_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A176_torrent
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:torrent_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A176_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:moran_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A176_vulgar_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:vulgar_moran_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A176_sordrenic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sordrenic_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A176_armonorican
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:armonorican_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A176_hravevi
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:hravevi_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A176_ardrainic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A176
		fallback = yes
	}
}

# A242: Greenheart
A242 = {
	type = country
	text = {
		localization_key = A242_ardrainic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:ardrainic_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A242_torrent
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:torrent_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A242_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:moran_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A242_vulgar_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:vulgar_moran_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A242_sordrenic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sordrenic_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A242_armonorican
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:armonorican_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A242_hravevi
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:hravevi_language }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A242_sordrenic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = A242
		fallback = yes
	}
}
